name: Mysterious Merchant
description: You encounter a hooded merchant offering strange wares.

name: Ancient Shrine
description: You discover an ancient shrine glowing with power.
options: Offer gold for blessing (20 gold for +5 max health)

name: Trapped Chest
description: A treasure chest sits in the middle of the room. It might be trapped.

name: Wandering Healer
description: A kind healer offers their services.
options: Learn healing skill (+1 max health, 15 gold)

name: Cursed Altar
description: A dark altar radiates malevolent energy. Risk and reward await.
options: Take the cursed item (rare item + curse)
